item.title: About
item.description: Hello, I’m Lovro, a seasoned professional coming at you from the beautiful crossroads of Slovenia and Austria. 🌍 My expertise lies in software engineering, and I am lucky enough to call it my passion as well as my work. I first dipped my toes into the world of engineering at the University of Maribor, where I got my master’s degree in Informatics. Today it’s almost 15 years since I started honing my coding skills.
